title: Publication of the Ranking List for Eligible Candidates
body:
We are pleased to announce the official ranking list of eligible candidates for the upcoming season. Candidates are listed in order of merit: in the event of a withdrawal or refusal, the position will be offered to the next individual in the ranking for that specific instrument. 
Example: if you are ranked 20th and there are only 18 spots available, you will be invited only if someone ranked ahead of you declines or does not confirm their participation.

**DEADLINE FOR ACCEPTANCE:** Thursday, 30/04 at 23:59 CET.
**HOW TO ACCEPT:** Please confirm your spot by emailing **orchestra@esyo.eu**. If we do not receive your confirmation by the deadline, we will proceed to the next candidate in the ranking.
**TERMS AND CONDITIONS:** By accepting your spot, you acknowledge and accept all regulations and fees as agreed upon during the application process.
**ELIGIBILITY:** Please note that if your name does not appear on this list, you have not been considered eligible for this selection.

author: ESYO Auditions Team

title: Summer Tour 2026: Auditions Results Coming Soon!
body:
The stage is set for an unforgettable summer! Following an incredible wave of talent in our latest auditions, we are ready to reveal the ensemble for the upcoming 'UNITED TOGETHER' Summer Tour (July 19 – August 9).
Get ready: the List of Eligible Musicians, the Official Invitations, and the Reserve List will be officially published on April 20th.
author: ESYO Auditions Team

title: A Symphony Across Borders: Two Exclusive Concerts in Trieste and Vipolže
body:
The 'LEGATO: Insieme nella musica' project is proud to present a magnificent double-concert event featuring the European Spirit of Youth Orchestra (ESYO). Titled 'SEMPLICEMENTE/ENOSTAVNO MOZART,' these performances celebrate the timeless genius of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart through the energy and passion of Europe’s finest young musical talents. Under the expert baton of Maestro Igor Coretti Kuret, the orchestra will be joined by world-class soloists Michaela Špačková on bassoon and Dumitru Pocitari on violin.
This unique musical journey bridges the border between Italy and Slovenia with two prestigious dates:
- April 6th at 9:00 PM: Join us in the majestic Throne Room of the Miramare Castle in Trieste, Italy.
- April 7th at 7:00 PM: Experience the magic at the historic Villa Vipolže in Slovenia.

Part of the 'GO! 2025' Small Project Fund, this initiative highlights the power of music to foster unity and cultural exchange across borders. We invite you to witness this extraordinary collaboration and support the next generation of European musicians as they bring classical masterpieces to life. For further details and updates, please visit our official website at www.esyo.eu.
